meta.summary: SRF assembles satellite repeat units from high-occurrence k-mer count tables.
meta.description: SRF assembles satellite repeat units from high-occurrence k-mer count tables.

test: test "$(sed -n 's/^commit=//p' /opt/srf/share/doc/srf/source.txt)" = 'e54ca8c8eccf6b1f19428b0f862f2c90575290a0' && test "$(sed -n 's/^version=//p' /opt/srf/share/doc/srf/source.txt)" = '20240109' && { srf 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: srf [options] <in.txt>' >/dev/null && { fmd-occ 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: fmd-occ [options] <in1.fmd>' >/dev/null && { srfutils.js 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: srfutils.js <command>' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v srf) | grep -F 'libz.so' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v k8) | grep -F 'libz.so' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-srf-core && cd /tmp/taf-srf-core && printf 'CCCCC 10\n' > count.txt && srf -p tiny -l 1 count.txt > out.fa 2> out.log && grep -F '[M::main] read 1 distinct k-mers' out.log >/dev/null && grep -F '>tiny#circ1-1 min=10,max=10,avg=10' out.fa >/dev/null && grep -Fx 'C' out.fa >/dev/null && gzip -c count.txt > count.txt.gz && srf -p gz -l 1 count.txt.gz > gz.fa && grep -F '>gz#circ1-1' gz.fa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-srf-utils && cd /tmp/taf-srf-utils && printf '>circ1-4
ACGT
' > circ.fa && srfutils.js enlong -l 10 circ.fa > enlong.fa && grep -F 'ACGTACGTACGT' enlong.fa >/dev/null && printf '>a
ACGT
>b
ACGT
' > merge.fa && srfutils.js merge merged merge.fa > merged.fa && grep -F '>merged*0001 a' merged.fa >/dev/null && test "$(grep -c '^>' merged.fa)" -eq 1 && printf 'chr1	0	20	circ1-4	2.5	100	4	1
' > hit.bed && srfutils.js bed2abun hit.bed > abun.txt && grep -F 'circ1-4' abun.txt >/dev/null

upstream.name: srf
upstream.citation: Zhang, Chu, Cheng and Li 2023, arXiv:2304.09729
